items.title: Here’s how far oil is away from dragging stocks into a bear market, according to Morgan Stanley
items.description: History shows market can recover quite quickly from geopolitical shocks

items.title: Here’s oil’s path to $120 per barrel, according to JPMorgan
items.description: The question is how high could oil prices go in the case of a sustained conflict.

items.title: Gasoil is spiking more than crude. What it is and why prices are soaring amid Iran conflict.
items.description: The workhorse of the fuel world was climbing on Monday, with a strike on a major Saudi Arabia refinery getting the blame.

items.title: Iran conflicts just adds to wall of worry for U.S. stocks, says Citi strategist
items.description: The rising oil price is just one more addition to the growing list of concerns that have stalled U.S. equity performance so far in 2026.

items.title: ‘Wonder Woman’ star Gal Gadot lists her elegant beachfront penthouse in Malibu for $8.75 million
items.description: Gadot and her husband have carried out extensive renovations of the home, which sits right on the beach.
